CustomField.description: Human-readable message for the LWC, e.g. "Detected 3 segments" or an error reason.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Human-readable message for the LWC — e.g. "Detected 3 segments" on progress or the exception text on an Error event. 255-char cap; long detail goes on Split_Job__c.Error_Detail__c instead.
CustomField.label: Message
